title: DOI Phase 10 — Build Artifacts (per intervention)
description: Structured form of build/{intervention-slug}/BUILD-NOTES.md and SHIP-CHECKLIST.md. One file per intervention, sibling to those markdown artifacts. Captures the architect-question answers, build-doctrine compliance block, template selection, and any conditional fields required by route.json tags or Stage 4 overrides.

template_used.description: Which builder template produced the artifact (per the table in doi-build §2b).

architect_questions.description: Principle 7 — answered in BUILD-NOTES.md. Vague answers ('the system tracks it') are CRITICAL per the critic.

ship_checklist_path.description: Relative path to SHIP-CHECKLIST.md from engagement root (e.g. 'build/{slug}/SHIP-CHECKLIST.md').

result_advanced.description: R# — result this artifact serves, or 'operational efficiency only'.

shipped.description: True after operator runs the SHIP-CHECKLIST and marks the intervention as shipped.

infrastructure_justified.description: Mirrored from route.json. When true, file_failure_mode_cited is required.

file_failure_mode_cited.description: Required when infrastructure_justified is true. Cites the specific failure mode (concurrent writes / aggregation / >10K-row scale) that justifies Postgres/queues/orchestrator.

stage_4_override_rationale.description: Required when stage == 4. References measured Stage 3 success per Principle 4.

extends_tool.description: Mirrored from route.json when intervention is tagged extend-existing.

new_system_justification.description: Mirrored from route.json when intervention is tagged new-system.

files_produced.description: Relative paths of artifact files produced under build/{intervention-slug}/.

principle_compliance.description: Build doctrine compliance block. Each principle is 'yes', 'N/A: <reason>', or 'violation: <reason>'.

p2_p4.description: Solo-agent / single agent until proven otherwise.

p6.description: Start with what we have built.

p7.description: Demo before doc + the three architect questions.
